summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Jobs board feature. Backend APIs fully functional at 100% success rate. Frontend Jobs page, Home page Latest Openings section, and Admin Dashboard Jobs functionality all working correctly with excellent integration.
passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/jobs returns 6 job listings including 3 seeded jobs
Backend API - POST /api/jobs with admin auth creates new jobs successfully
Backend API - Admin authentication with session token working
Backend API - Admin stats endpoint returns correct job count
Jobs page loads and displays 6 job listings correctly
Jobs page search functionality - 'farm' filter shows Seasonal Farm Worker
Jobs page visa type filter - H-2A filter works correctly
Job detail dialog opens with Apply Now and Contact Us buttons
Apply Now button correctly links to /apply page
Contact Us button correctly links to /contact page
Navigation bar Jobs link navigates to /jobs page
Home page displays Latest Openings section with 3 job cards
Home page View All Jobs button links to /jobs page
Admin Dashboard Jobs tab shows job listings table
Admin Dashboard Create Job button opens job creation form
Admin job creation form has all required fields with validation
Admin visa type dropdown contains H-2A, H-2B, Other options
All 3 seeded jobs verified: Seasonal Farm Worker (H-2A, CA), Hotel Housekeeper (H-2B, FL), Landscaping Crew Member (H-2B, TX)
